sourceSummary.oneLine: Invoice No. 24206 from 3EC International a. s. to H&abyz Co., Ltd. for medical device QMS certification and recertification audit services.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Billing record for Certification Audit as per Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and Recertification Audit as per EN ISO 13485:2016 performed April 15th - 17th, 2024.
keyPoints: Supplier is 3EC International a. s.; customer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
The invoice references Application No. MDR199_2023 and contracts SK-0743-MDR/23 and SK-0743-S/23.

Services invoiced include Certification Audit as per Regulation (EU) 2017/745, Recertification Audit as per EN ISO 13485, certification fees, postage and packing, and review of corrective actions and audit nonconformity closure.
Product specification is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, Models: A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW.
Total amount to be paid is EUR 15 250,00.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA; it mentions Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and EN ISO 13485:2016.
Document is an invoice, not a certificate, declaration, audit report, or regulatory approval document; regulatory status should not be inferred.
No invoice-specific revision or version is present; quoted reference includes rev. 0 but applies to Quote No. 3EC/018/2023_MDR_ZUM, not this invoice.
